title: LSML 1.0 — webhook_receive adapter
description: Inbound HTTP endpoint hosted by the server. POST bodies (JSON) are merged into `writes_to`. Useful for third-party webhooks (Stripe, Twitch EventSub, etc.).

path.description: URL path the server hosts the endpoint at, e.g. "/hooks/stripe-payments". MUST start with `/`.

auth.description: Optional inbound authentication (the server validates incoming requests).

header.description: Header to read the credential from.

from_secret.description: Secret name resolved by the server-side secret store. The shared secret used to verify HMAC or compare bearer.

merge_strategy.description: `append` is useful for event-log-style adapters: each POST appends to an array under `writes_to`.

max_body_bytes.description: Maximum POST body size. Larger requests get HTTP 413.
